title: 基于单目视觉的室内场景三维重建关键技术研究

papers_top5.title: Manydepth2: Motion-Aware Self-Supervised Monocular Depth Estimation in Dynamic Scenes
MonoIndoor++:Towards Better Practice of Self-Supervised Monocular Depth Estimation for Indoor Environments
Multi-modal On-Device Learning for Monocular Depth Estimation on Ultra-low-power MCUs
Unsupervised Monocular Depth and Ego-motion Learning with Structure and Semantics
InSpaceType: Reconsider Space Type in Indoor Monocular Depth Estimation

research_basis.title: Improving Monocular Depth Estimation in Dynamic Indoor Scenes
research_basis.research_question: How can monocular depth estimation be improved for dynamic indoor scenes, such as rooms and corridors, using motion-aware self-supervision?
research_basis.baseline: Manydepth2: Motion-Aware Self-Supervised Monocular Depth Estimation in Dynamic Scenes
research_basis.data_source: Cityscapes, KITTI, Make3D, and our dynamic scene dataset
research_basis.experiment_metrics: Manydepth2: Motion-Aware Self-Supervised Monocular Depth Estimation in Dynamic Scenes
research_basis.risk: The dynamic scene dataset may not be publicly available, limiting reproducibility.

research_basis.title: Enhancing Monocular Depth Estimation for Indoor Environments with Semantic Priors
research_basis.research_question: Can the integration of semantic segmentation priors improve monocular depth estimation in indoor scenes like rooms and corridors?
research_basis.baseline: Monocular Segment-Wise Depth: Monocular Depth Estimation Based on a Semantic Segmentation Prior
research_basis.experiment_metrics: Monocular Segment-Wise Depth: Monocular Depth Estimation Based on a Semantic Segmentation Prior
research_basis.risk: The effectiveness of semantic priors in complex indoor scenes may be limited by the quality of semantic segmentation models.

research_basis.title: Self-Supervised Monocular Depth Estimation for Indoor Scenes: A Reproducibility Study
research_basis.research_question: How does MonoIndoor++ perform on standard indoor datasets, and can its techniques be adapted to other indoor environments like corridors?
research_basis.baseline: MonoIndoor++:Towards Better Practice of Self-Supervised Monocular Depth Estimation for Indoor Environments
research_basis.experiment_metrics: MonoIndoor++:Towards Better Practice of Self-Supervised Monocular Depth Estimation for Indoor Environments
research_basis.risk: The dataset used for evaluation might not cover diverse indoor scenarios, such as corridors.

research_basis.title: Generalizing Monocular Depth Estimation in Indoor Scenes via Distillation
research_basis.research_question: Can knowledge distillation improve the robustness and accuracy of monocular depth estimation in indoor scenes such as rooms?
research_basis.baseline: Distill Any Depth: Distillation Creates a Stronger Monocular Depth Estimator
research_basis.experiment_metrics: Distill Any Depth: Distillation Creates a Stronger Monocular Depth Estimator
research_basis.risk: The distillation process may require a large amount of computational resources.

research_basis.title: Unsupervised Learning of Monocular Depth and Ego-Motion for Indoor 3D Reconstruction
research_basis.research_question: How effective is unsupervised monocular depth and ego-motion learning for 3D reconstruction of indoor scenes, and can it be applied to rooms and corridors?
research_basis.baseline: Unsupervised Monocular Depth and Ego-motion Learning with Structure and Semantics
research_basis.experiment_metrics: Unsupervised Monocular Depth and Ego-motion Learning with Structure and Semantics
research_basis.risk: Unsupervised methods may struggle with the lack of ground truth depth data in indoor scenes.
